tourist.title: Tourist Pricing
tourist.description: Discover our subscription plans for tourists. From free to VIP with concierge service.

hero.title: Tourist Plans
hero.description: Find the perfect plan for your adventures in the Argentine Litoral. From basic browsing to VIP service with personalized concierge.

0.question: Can I change my plan at any time?
0.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or change your plan at any time from your account. Changes will be applied in the next billing cycle.

1.question: What payment methods do you accept?
1.answer: We accept all payment methods through MercadoPago, including credit cards, debit cards, and bank transfers.

2.question: Is there a trial period?
2.answer: The Free plan requires no credit card. Plus and VIP plans offer a 7-day free trial.

cta.title: Ready to start your adventure?
cta.description: Sign up for free and start exploring the best accommodations in the Argentine Litoral.

owner.title: Owner Pricing
owner.description: Discover our subscription plans for accommodation owners. From basic to premium with dedicated account manager.

hero.title: Owner Plans
hero.description: Choose the ideal plan to manage and promote your accommodations. From basic listing to professional tools with dedicated account manager.

0.question: What is included in the free trial?
0.answer: The 14-day free trial includes full access to all features of the selected plan, with no credit card required.

1.question: Can I change my plan later?
1.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or change your plan at any time. Changes are reflected immediately and billing is adjusted proportionally.

2.question: Are there additional costs per booking?
2.answer: We do not charge booking commissions. The plan price covers all functionalities. Guest payments are processed via MercadoPago with their standard fees.

cta.title: Ready to grow your business?
cta.description: Start your 14-day free trial and discover how Hospeda can help you increase your bookings.

owner-basico.name: Basic
owner-basico.description: Ideal plan to start publishing your first accommodation. The essentials for your property.

owner-pro.name: Professional
owner-pro.description: Advanced statistics, featured listing, and priority support to grow your business.

owner-premium.name: Premium
owner-premium.description: Everything in Professional, plus custom branding, API access, and a dedicated manager.

tourist-free.name: Free
tourist-free.description: Save favorites, read reviews, and plan your next trip at no cost.

tourist-plus.name: Plus
tourist-plus.description: Ad-free browsing, price alerts, exclusive deals, and early access to events.

tourist-vip.name: VIP
tourist-vip.description: VIP support, concierge, airport transfers, and exclusive promotions.

comparison.complexTeaser: Special plans for complexes and hotels — coming soon
